description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular metallic head with beveled edges and a textured striking surface, giving it a robust and heavy-duty appearance. The head is predominantly dark gray with metallic highlights, and it is attached to a cylindrical handle that is wrapped with a series of metallic rings for enhanced grip. The handle is straight, dark brown, and capped with a metallic pommel, from which a looped leather strap is attached for secure handling or hanging. The overall design is reminiscent of a sledgehammer or a ceremonial hammer, with a solid, industrial aesthetic. The materials suggest a combination of metal for the head and rings, and possibly wood or composite for the handle, with leather for the strap. The hammer appears pristine, with no visible signs of wear or damage, and is likely very heavy, suitable for demanding tasks or as a symbolic object.
description: A heavy, rectangular-headed hammer with a metallic finish, ringed handle, and a leather strap loop. The design is robust and industrial, with no visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the hammer head and the straight, ringed handle extending upward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular profile of the head, the metallic rings on the handle, and the attached leather strap loop.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite flat face of the hammer head, similar to the front, with the handle and rings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the metallic detailing on the head and the full length of the handle with the strap looped outward.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood or composite, wrapped with metallic rings for grip, capped with a metallic pommel, and featuring a leather strap loop.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges and flat striking faces, made of metal.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Leather strap loop attached to the handle pommel
